title: cheddars better huds
description: This adds a ton of huds to the game such as FPS keystrokes and more!
body:
THis mod adds SO much to the game spicing up your game with huds. Huds like:
* Reach HUD
* Keystrokes
* FPS
* Potions
* Combo HUD
And Tons More!

Updates will be posted here! 
Visit my GitHub Page: https://github.com/Stringcheese272
